Name: ActionButtonParam
Description: Determines the parameters used for interactable prompts.

Fields.Name: Region Type
Fields.Description: Range shape (cylinder, prism, capsule)

Fields.Name: Category
Fields.Description: category. The number on the left side of the name is the priority when multiple action buttons overlap (the closer it is to 0, the higher the priority is displayed).

Fields.Name: Dummy Poly [1]
Fields.Description: Specify the dummy polygon ID that is the center of the bottom of the range. If there is no dummy polygon or -1 is entered, the center coordinates will be the reference.

Fields.Name: Dummy Poly [2]
Fields.Description: Used only when the range type is a capsule. Additional dummy polygon (capsule) that creates a line segment with two dummy polygons

Fields.Name: Radius
Fields.Description: Radius (cylinder / capsule)

Fields.Name: Angle
Fields.Description: Angle (cylinder)

Fields.Name: Depth
Fields.Description: Depth (prism)

Fields.Name: Width
Fields.Description: Width (prism)

Fields.Name: Height
Fields.Description: Height (cylinder / prism)

Fields.Name: Bottom Height Offset
Fields.Description: How much to raise or lower the Y coordinate of the bottom (cylinder / prism)

Fields.Name: Angle Difference Check Type
Fields.Description: Angle difference judgment type (cylinder / prism)

Fields.Name: Allowable Angle Difference
Fields.Description: Allowable angle difference (cylinder / prism)

Fields.Name: Action Spot Dummy Polygon
Fields.Description: If there is no dummy polygon that specifies the dummy polygon ID that will be the position of the action spot, or if -1 is entered, the center coordinates will be the reference.

Fields.Name: Textbox Type
Fields.Description: Text box type

Fields.Name: Is Invalid when Riding
Fields.Description: If enabled, this action will not appear whilst in the 'riding' state.

Fields.Name: Is Grayed Out when Riding
Fields.Description: If enabled, this action will be grayed out whilst in the 'riding' state.

Fields.Name: Invalid for Crouching
Fields.Description: If enabled, this action will not appear whilst in the 'crouching' state.

Fields.Name: Greyout for Crouching
Fields.Description: If enabled, this action will be grayed out whilst in the 'crouching' state.

Fields.Name: Text ID
Fields.Description: The FMG Entry ID to display.

Fields.Name: Invalid Event Flag
Fields.Description: If the event flag is ON, then this action will not appear.

Fields.Name: Grayout Event Flag
Fields.Description: If the event flag is ON, then this action will be grayed out.

Fields.Name: Override Button ID for Ride
Fields.Description: Replace with this action button ID parameter while riding (-1: No replacement)

Fields.Name: Execution Invalid Time
Fields.Description: Invalid time after execution (-infinite by value)

Fields.Name: Interaction Icon Offset: X
Fields.Description: Offset for interaction icon position

Fields.Name: Interaction Icon Offset: Y
Fields.Description: Offset for interaction icon position

Fields.Name: Interaction Icon Offset: Z
Fields.Description: Offset for interaction icon position
